text.title: Vector Databases — Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: profile corpus → pick DB → ingest plan → tenant policy → ship + backup.

step.name: profile-corpus
step.action: Estimate vector count today + 12mo growth. List metadata fields and required filters. Note embedding model + dim + metric.
step.decision-gate: If <1k vectors — STOP; use numpy in-memory; no DB needed.

step.name: pick-db
step.action: Apply decision tree. Pin kind + connection + collection schema in vector-db.yaml.
step.decision-gate: If kind==chroma but profile says production — choose another (fm-01).

step.name: ingest-plan
step.action: Batch-embed with content-hash dedup. Pin model version. Time the ingest; budget for re-ingest.
step.decision-gate: If re-ingest time exceeds operational tolerance — choose a DB with faster bulk-load (Milvus, Qdrant).

step.name: tenant-policy
step.action: Pick strategy: payload filter (Qdrant), namespace (Pinecone), separate collection per tenant. Wire tenant_id as required arg in retrieve().
step.output: tenant filter live; canary test added
step.decision-gate: If tenant_id not required at signature — block ship (r3-tenant-filter-required).

step.name: ship-and-backup
step.action: Roll out 10% → 50% → 100%. Schedule daily snapshot. Verify restore in staging.
step.decision-gate: If backup not verified — block declare-done; data risk unacceptable.
